markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align content strategy with internal shifts and unblock the publishing pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Focus:** Shift from mid-funnel to top-of-funnel (ToFu) content for "AI laggards," prioritizing definitional articles that require minimal SME review to accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** GrowthX will now focus on two strategic pillars: the new ToFu content lane and a dedicated initiative to improve You.com's LLM visibility, addressing a key executive priority.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [**Competitor Naming Ban:** A new CEO directive prohibits naming competitors in marketing materials. GrowthX will use Check That data to prove that comparison articles (which name competitors) are the most cited, providing data for Brooke to challenge the policy.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** GrowthX will deliver a Q1 performance summary and a revised Q2 strategy focused on the new ToFu and LLM visibility goals.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline Blockers

  - [**Primary Blocker:** A large content backlog is stalling publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Contributing Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**High Review Overhead:** Content requires extensive SME and design reviews, which are slow.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Strategic Pivots:** Frequent internal strategy shifts (e.g., new competitor naming ban) invalidate written content, forcing rework.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Irrelevant Backlog:** Much of the existing backlog is no longer relevant, making it inefficient to publish.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new content hire will help manage the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### New Content Strategy & Focus

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The new focus is on top-of-funnel (ToFu) content for "AI laggards."](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This content type (e.g., "What is a web crawler?") requires minimal SME review, enabling faster publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Immediate Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Scope and build a content calendar for the new ToFu lane.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**You.com:** Provide a list of existing white papers to be repurposed into multiple blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### LLM Visibility & Check That

  - [**Executive Priority:** Improving LLM visibility is a top executive concern.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:** GrowthX will use the Check That platform to provide data-driven insights and recommendations to address this priority.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [**Platform Demo:** Bailey demoed Check That, which tracks You.com's position, sentiment, and citations in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** The platform will provide data proving that comparison articles (which name competitors) are the most cited, giving Brooke leverage to challenge the naming ban.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
      - [Clean up the Check That account and record a Loom walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
      - [Grant the You.com team access to Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
      - [Deliver a Q1 performance summary and a revised Q2 strategy focused on ToFu and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Create a "Hold" status in the content tracker for Brooke to use.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [**You.com:**](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Review the content backlog and move irrelevant articles to the "Hold" status.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Compile a list of white papers for repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/1Pv5zfZMEu_xFNqbb8uv3NXszPizjvDC?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
